name: Peet Limited
analysis: PPC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.6550, stop A$1.5939, target A$1.9600 (4.99:1) — then trail it.
